direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
- **Concept:** Single product hero shot — sunglasses centered on a dark red/maroon textured surface (looks like worn leather or concrete), dramatic moody lighting. Short headline + subtext below the product. Clean, premium, minimal.
- **DuberyMNL swap-in:** Replace the product with a DuberyMNL pair (defaulting to **outback-black** unless specified), headline swapped to DuberyMNL copy in the bold italic brand font, DuberyMNL logo added. Dark rich background matched to concept tone.
- **Routing:** Bespoke single-product hero — `brand-bold` style prompt, dark dramatic surface, product centered, 2-line text below. Aspect ratio **4:5** (default) unless you want to change it.

Hit Generate when ready.
use 16:9
- **Same concept:** Single product hero, sunglasses centered on dark red/maroon textured surface, moody dramatic lighting, DuberyMNL headline + subtext below, logo applied.
- **Only change:** Aspect ratio updated to **16:9** — wider canvas means more breathing room on the sides; product stays centered, text sits below.
- **Everything else held:** Outback Black as default product, DuberyMNL bold italic font, dark rich background matching concept tone.

Hit Generate when ready.
